home.title: Take on other designers
home.subtitle: Step into the arena and design mockups against the clock. The community votes, you climb the ranks.
home.step1Body: A mockup theme is drawn at random.

play.uploadHint: PNG, JPG or WebP · 5 MB max
play.invalidType: Format not allowed (PNG, JPG or WebP only).
play.submitted: Mockup submitted. It will appear in the feed.
play.timeUpBody: Nothing was submitted. Try again next time.
play.abandonConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to give up?
play.abandonConfirmBody: Your current round will be lost and cannot be resumed.

help.title: One theme, one mockup, one battle!
help.step1Body: A random theme appears and you have 10 minutes to create your mockup.
help.step2Body: Drop your image before the timer runs out to enter the battle.
help.step3Body: Submissions show up in the feed and the community votes for the best designs.
help.step4Body: Earn points, climb the leaderboard and unlock rewards.

username.title: Choose your username
username.subtitle: It will show on your mockups and the leaderboard

feed.title: Feed
feed.subtitle: Vote on the community's mockups.
feed.empty: No mockups to vote on yet. Check back later!
feed.rateLimited: You're voting too fast. Wait a moment before continuing.
feed.selfVote: You can't vote on your own mockup.
feed.reported: Thanks, your report has been recorded.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Updated in real time
leaderboard.noResults: No player found for your search.
leaderboard.heroEmpty: No one on the leaderboard yet.

profileSubmissions.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This action is permanent.
profileSubmissions.reportBody: Are you sure you want to report this submission?

profileReport.title: Report this account?
profileReport.body: Briefly explain why you want to report this account.

submissionSuccess.title: Mockup submitted!
submissionSuccess.description: It will appear in the feed so the community can vote on it.

profileLogout.title: Sign out?
profileLogout.body: Are you sure you want to sign out?

admin.title: Moderation
admin.subtitle: Mockups reported by the community.
admin.empty: No reported mockups at the moment.
admin.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this mockup and notify the author?
admin.deleteAccountBody: This will permanently delete the account, submissions, votes, reports and sessions. This action cannot be undone.
